relations.note: The gold/sunshine avoidance is an exception carved out of the known-safe pairing guidance.
Known-safe pairs are the pre-validated combinations that satisfy the WCAG AA contrast testing requirement.

quotes: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold
WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold

rules.intent: Guarantee baseline legibility and accessibility compliance across all brand materials.
rules.rule_text: Every text/background pair must be contrast-tested (e.g. via webaim.com or equivalent) to meet WCAG AA minimums: 4.5:1 for body text (contrast.ratio.body = 4.5:1) and 3:1 for large text ≥24px or 19px bold (contrast.ratio.large = 3:1).

quotes: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.

rules.intent: Standardize on pre-validated color combinations that reliably meet contrast requirements.
rules.rule_text: Use known-safe contrast pairings: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), or Graphite (#212121) text on White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#E6F0F9), or Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) backgrounds; and White text on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy backgrounds.

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
effect.subject: Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White background

quotes: Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Prevent accessibility failures from low-contrast gold-on-white text usage.
rules.rule_text: Do not use Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) as text color on White backgrounds, since this combination fails contrast; gold tones are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure meaning is accessible to users who cannot distinguish color differences.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair color-coded information with icons, depth, clear copy, or other visual feedback.
